ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of the post (e.g., standard_post) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand associated with the post, if any */,
  "branch_url" TEXT /* URL link to the post */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "published_hour" INTEGER /* Hour the post was published */,
  "published_day" TEXT /* Day of the week the post was published */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week the post was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL for the post thumbnail image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Main content of the post */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_brand_name FOREIGN KEY ("brand_name") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the author's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the author account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the author account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the brand's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment received */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is hidden */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the post received */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score based on views, likes, and shares */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the engagement metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the engagement metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Sports News, Events) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for nested categories */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for the category icon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
